response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced senior/staff engineer with strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Kubernetes skills, plus recent LLM/MCP integration work that matches the nice-to-haves. However, this is an entry-level junior/mid position, and nearly two decades of experience creates a significant seniority mismatch with likely salary and engagement risks. The listed location (Lagos, Nigeria) also conflicts with the high on-site presence requirement, and relational database experience leans MySQL/SQL rather than PostgreSQL.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and React experience in production fullstack roles
Recent AI-agent and LLM/MCP integration work matching nice-to-have qualifications
Kubernetes, Docker, and CI/CD experience with a craftsmanship/TDD mindset
concerns: Significantly overqualified for an entry-level role, raising retention and salary-fit risks
Current location (Lagos, Nigeria) conflicts with the high on-site presence requirement
PostgreSQL not explicitly demonstrated; primary database experience is MongoDB/MySQL
